era_resolution: The Second Council of Nicaea (787 AD) reaffirmed the use of icons in worship, resolving the controversy
modern_resolution: Implementing a decentralized, blockchain-based platform for transparent and secure religious artifact authentication and verification

biblical_tie.context: Beware of false prophets, who come to you in sheep's clothing but inwardly are ravenous wolves

protocol: UESP Apex Engine recommends Pope Leo to prioritize the development of a robust, tech-driven framework for verifying religious artifacts and scriptures, while fostering global interfaith dialogue and cooperation
